name: GSM Standard Codes
description: Carrier-independent MMI/USSD codes defined by the GSM standard. They work on most GSM networks worldwide, although some carriers disable a few of them.

codes.name: Show IMEI
codes.description: Displays the device IMEI number(s). Useful for warranty, blocking a stolen phone or carrier support.

codes.name: Forward all calls
codes.description: Registers and activates unconditional call forwarding to the given number.

codes.name: Stop forwarding all calls
codes.description: Deactivates and erases unconditional call forwarding.

codes.name: Forward-all status
codes.description: Checks whether unconditional call forwarding is active.

codes.name: Forward when unanswered
codes.description: Forwards calls to the given number when you do not answer.

codes.name: Stop forwarding when unanswered
codes.description: Deactivates and erases forwarding for unanswered calls.

codes.name: Forward-when-unanswered status
codes.description: Checks whether forwarding for unanswered calls is active.

codes.name: Forward when unreachable
codes.description: Forwards calls to the given number when the phone is off or out of coverage.

codes.name: Stop forwarding when unreachable
codes.description: Deactivates and erases forwarding for unreachable states.

codes.name: Forward-when-unreachable status
codes.description: Checks whether forwarding for unreachable states is active.

codes.name: Forward when busy
codes.description: Forwards calls to the given number when the line is busy.

codes.name: Stop forwarding when busy
codes.description: Deactivates and erases forwarding for busy-line calls.

codes.name: Forward-when-busy status
codes.description: Checks whether forwarding for busy-line calls is active.

codes.name: Cancel all forwarding
codes.description: Deactivates and erases every call forwarding rule at once.

codes.name: Enable call waiting
codes.description: Activates call waiting so a second incoming call beeps during a call.

codes.name: Disable call waiting
codes.description: Deactivates call waiting.

codes.name: Call waiting status
codes.description: Checks whether call waiting is active.

codes.name: Hide caller ID for one call
codes.description: Calls the given number hiding your caller ID for that single call.

codes.name: Show caller ID for one call
codes.description: Calls the given number forcing your caller ID to be visible for that single call.

codes.name: Caller ID sending status
codes.description: Checks whether your caller ID is sent on outgoing calls (CLIR).

codes.name: Incoming caller ID status
codes.description: Checks whether incoming caller ID display is enabled (CLIP).

codes.name: Change SIM PIN
codes.description: Changes the SIM card PIN from the dialer.
codes.notes: Three wrong PIN attempts lock the SIM and require the PUK to unlock it.

codes.name: Unblock SIM with PUK
codes.description: Unblocks a PIN-locked SIM using the PUK and sets a new PIN.
codes.notes: Ten wrong PUK attempts permanently disable the SIM card.

codes.name: Bar outgoing calls
codes.description: Blocks all outgoing calls using the carrier barring password.
codes.notes: You will not be able to place calls until barring is removed. The password is set by your carrier.

codes.name: Remove outgoing call barring
codes.description: Removes the outgoing call barring using the carrier barring password.

codes.name: Outgoing call barring status
codes.description: Checks whether outgoing calls are barred.
